response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned generalist with roughly 19 years of production engineering, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and current hands-on work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling, which maps directly to the role's model-context-protocol and agentic focus. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI solutions, and his AI-specific experience spans only about a year; there is no evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, all core to this position. He could be worth a screen for the customer-facing FDE profile, but the GenAI depth gap is substantial for a staff-level AI role.
strengths: Current MCP and agentic-workflow infrastructure experience at re:cinq
~19 years of production engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput low-latency systems
Strong mentorship and stakeholder-facing record via workshops, courses, and conference talks
concerns: Only ~1 year of GenAI experience versus the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated vector database, RAG, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
Python is absent from his skill set and cloud platform experience is limited (AWS CDK in one role)

key_factors.factor: Hands-on MCP and agentic tooling work
Missing RAG, vector DB, and LLM eval expertise
